title: Analytics - Device Deleted
scenario: "device_deleted" analytics event logs Device Name, PID, and Serial when removing a device from Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Navigate to the Home screen and ensure a Bluetooth audio device is paired and connected.
Tap on the connected device to open Device Settings.
Tap the three-dot menu (or gear icon) in the top-right corner of Device Settings.
Select 'Remove Device' or 'Delete Device' from the menu.
Open your Android phone's Settings app.
Find the same device in the paired list and tap 'Forget' or 'Unpair' to remove it from the phone's Bluetooth settings.
Open the Firebase Console for the Poly Studio Mobile app project.
Navigate to the Events section and search for the 'device_deleted' event.
Verify that the event count has incremented (note: count may update after a few hours).
Inspect the event parameters to confirm Device Name, Device PID, and Device Serial are captured correctly.
expected: The 'device_deleted' event is logged in Firebase with the correct Device Name, Device PID, and Device Serial parameters. The event count increments after a few hours.
